title: cypripedium × albanense
intro: Cypripedium × albanense, also known as the Albanense Lady's Slipper Orchid, is a rare and hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Cypripedium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cypripedium × albanense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture and used to treat various ailments, although modern herbal preparations may vary in their processing and application.
